location.label: Collapse All button in Bookmarks tool window toolbar
location.name: Collapse All button in Bookmarks tool window toolbar
location.reasoning: The Bookmarks tool window toolbar contains several small icons. In Android Studio's Bookmarks tool window, the typical toolbar layout from left to right is: Jump to Source, Show all bookmarks, Collapse All, View Options. z31 at (888, 730) is the third icon from the left in this row, which corresponds to the Collapse All button position. This is the standard position for the Collapse All button in the Bookmarks tool window.
